name: team_pass_yards_from_plays on player view with multi-year scope and no year split
description: Regression: when a player-cell view selects team-stat-from-plays (team-variant) columns over multiple years without a year split, the team-stat attribution must follow the player's per-(pid, year) team rather than collapsing to the latest-year team. The fix promotes the base nfl_plays CTE to (nfl_team, year) grain and re-shapes the `_team_stats` CTE so it INNER JOINs player_year_teams on (team, year) and SUMs back to pid; the outer query then joins `_team_stats` 1:1 on pid. Davante Adams (LV/2023 + NYJ/2024 + LA/2025) returns 12437 = 3714 + 4016 + 4707 instead of the buggy 13103 (LA's full 3-year total). Amari Cooper (CLE/2023 + BUF/2024, no 2025) returns 7949 = 4011 + 3938 instead of NULL. This test pins the wrap-CTE shape so future refactors don't silently revert to the broken single-year-snapshot join.
expected_query: with "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('WR') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
